title: I've studied over 200 kids. Here's the No. 1 skill parents are forgetting to teach kids today
summary_full: Parents today try to raise their children for good grades and high achievement. But that's not what we should be focusing on, says child psychologist Reem Raouda, who has studied over 200 kids. She shares the most important skill parents are forgetting to teach today.
